trigger.parentTitle: Barbara Ling Dead: Michael Once Upon a Time in Hollywood Production Designer Was 73
trigger.overview: Barbara Ling, the production designer behind Once Upon a Time in Hollywood (2019) and Michael (2026), has died. She was 73. The Academy Award winner died on Thursday in Santa Barbara after she was diagnosed with cancer, a WME spokesperson confirmed to Deadline. Equally gifted at period authenticity, contemporary realism, and stylized fantasy, Ling leaves [ ]
